name: 8-Bit Capital
notes: Early-stage VC firm founded by Jonathan Abrams; HQ at 548 Market Street PMB 63932, San Francisco, CA 94104.

name: JAbrams.com
notes: Personal website of Jonathan Abrams, co-founder of 8-Bit Capital and Founders Den. Based in San Francisco. Not a standalone company entity.

name: 11 Tribes
notes: Full name is 11 Tribes Ventures; early-stage fund focused on diverse founders. HQ: 1 Mid America Plaza 3rd Floor, Oakbrook Terrace, IL 60181.

name: 412 Fund
notes: Full name is 412 Venture Fund; HQ at 625 Liberty Ave, Pittsburgh, PA 15222. Area code 412 refers to Pittsburgh.

name: 640 Oxford
notes: Michigan-based VC firm; office at Newlab at Michigan Central, Detroit. Also listed as West Bloomfield in some older sources; Detroit/Newlab is the confirmed active location per Crain's Detroit Business (2024).

name: a16z
notes: Andreessen Horowitz (a16z); flagship HQ at 2865 Sand Hill Road, Menlo Park, CA 94025.

name: Accomplice
notes: Also known as Accomplice VC; seed-stage VC firm; HQ at 56 Wareham Street Floor 3, Boston, MA 02118.

name: Acronym
notes: Global search and performance marketing agency; HQ in the Empire State Building, New York City. Founded 1995; offices in Singapore, Toronto, Berlin.

name: Alpaca VC
notes: AI-native seed fund focused on foundational industries; HQ at 500 5th Ave Floor 46, New York, NY 10110.

name: AmplifyHer Ventures
notes: VC fund investing in female-founded companies; most sources list New York City (10014); one source (PitchBook) lists Greenwich, CT. New York is the majority consensus.

name: Angel
notes: No domain provided. 'Angel' is too generic to confidently identify — could be AngelList (San Francisco), Angel Ventures, an individual angel investor, or another entity. Cannot resolve without more context.

name: Anthos
notes: Full name Anthos Capital; HQ at 201 Santa Monica Blvd Suite 450, Santa Monica, CA 90401. Founded 2007; ~$2.9B AUM. Note: 'Anthos' also refers to Google's Kubernetes platform but that is a Google product, not a standalone company.
